Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT ROBERT HENRY BLUMENTHAL, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT HENRY BLUMENTHAL'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Serve Further Responses To Defendant's Interrogatories Set One - To be heard at 9:00 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

Mtn For Order Compelling The Pltf To Serve Further Responses To Deft'S Interrogatories, Set #1 And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert Henry Blumenthal, Law Office of Robert Henry Blumenthal, 707.995.3637, appearing for the Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court changes it's tentative ruling sua sponte.

Ruling: Motion denied without prejudice to the moving party's ability to file a motion to reopen discovery pursuant to CCP 2024.050. Movant set the hearing date later than 15 days before the initial trial date cutoff of CCP 2024.020. Court to issue the order. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
